market.macro_notes_md: JULY 14 2026 PRE-MARKET: Three macro forces collide today. (1) IRAN/HORMUZ: Trump announced US blockade on Iranian shipping; Brent crude $85+ — risk-off for equities, bullish for energy. Strait of Hormuz controls ~20% of global oil supply. (2) BANK EARNINGS BLOWOUT: GS +45% beat (record Q2), JPM +5.5%, BAC +7.7%, WFC +16.3% — strongest bank earnings in years. Investment banking + trading revenue surging on volatile markets. (3) CPI June 2026 at 8:30 AM ET: Expected headline 3.8-3.9% (down from 4.2% on gasoline -10%); core 2.8-2.9% (sticky). Fed pricing September HIKE under Warsh. Kevin Warsh inaugural Congressional testimony today — first chance to hear his public rate guidance. Net: financials bullish, semis/high-multiple-tech bearish, CPI is the session swing factor. AMD 'Advancing AI 2026' conference July 22-23. IBM earnings July 22 (IBM EXIT DEADLINE: July 17 EOD). BlackRock reports July 15. Netflix reports July 16 AH.
